summary: Iteration 14: Major backend refactoring validation COMPLETE. Monolithic server.py (5235 lines) successfully replaced with 79-line entry point + 19 router modules. All 43 backend API tests passed. Frontend login and dashboard fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ - Health check returns 'SSC Track API'
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin invalid password correctly rejected (401)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user with admin token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user with employee token
Backend: GET /api/customers-balance - Returns customer balance summary
Backend: GET /api/reports/credit-sales - Returns credit sales report
Backend: GET /api/reports/branch-cashbank - Returns branch cash/bank report
Backend: GET /api/reports/supplier-balance - Returns supplier balance report
Backend: GET /api/reports/item-pnl - Returns item P&L report
Frontend: Admin login with ss@ssc.com successful
Frontend: Dashboard renders with all data (sales, expenses, profits, charts)
Frontend: Full sidebar navigation visible (20+ menu items)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful: 19 router modules properly imported in server.py
All routes prefixed with /api via app.include_router(module.router, prefix='/api')
Database connection maintained in database.py with proper auth helpers
JWT authentication working correctly for both admin and employee roles
All 43 tested endpoints return expected status codes and data structures
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Refactored_Branch during testing (visible in dashboard branch selector)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 complete. Major backend refactoring validated - all 19 router modules working. The monolithic server.py was successfully replaced. Auth works for both admin (ss@ssc.com) and employee (ahmed@test.com). All CRUD endpoints functional. Frontend login/dashboard confirmed working. No regressions detected from refactoring.
